playwright_visible.name: Playwright Browser (GUI)
args: export DISPLAY=:0; export XAUTHORITY=/home/eric/.Xauthority; export WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-0; export XDG_SESSION_TYPE=wayland; export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/1000; exec npx @playwright/mcp@latest --proxy-server http://127.0.0.1:8088 --ignore-https-errors --user-data-dir /home/eric/.mantis-chrome-visible
